---
title: "Tour De France"
format: html
---

The Tour de France is a multi-day multi-stage bike race around france and surrounding countries. Athletes are pushed to their limit both physiologically and psychologically for ego, earnings, teamates, and national pride. I will be looking at best nation, best age, and interesting outliers.

The goal for the me is to teach the reader about the tour and help them learn about some interesting facts and data.

The idea I want the reader to take away is how to scrape data, how to create simple plots and to graph the data in a meaningful way.

https://www.procyclingstats.com/race/tour-de-france/statistics
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
rider = data
```
